task_completion.description: Import the source Tier II XML data into CAMEO Data Manager
task_completion.visual_evidence: CAMEO Data Manager interface showing the imported facilities: 'Montpelier Industrial Supply' and 'Richmond Processing Plant', or an import success dialog.

task_completion.description: Add Robert Flanagan as a contact for Montpelier Industrial Supply
task_completion.visual_evidence: A contact record or list in CAMEO Data Manager showing 'Robert Flanagan' associated with the 'Montpelier Industrial Supply' facility.

task_completion.description: Verify Robert Flanagan's contact details and type
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contact record for Robert Flanagan shows the title 'Emergency Response Coordinator', phone number '802-555-0219', and the contact type 'Fac. Emergency Coordinator'.

task_completion.description: Add Maria Santos as a contact for Richmond Processing Plant
task_completion.visual_evidence: A contact record or list in CAMEO Data Manager showing 'Maria Santos' associated with the 'Richmond Processing Plant' facility.

task_completion.description: Verify Maria Santos's contact details and types
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contact record for Maria Santos shows the title 'Plant Safety Officer', phone number '802-555-0347', and BOTH contact types 'Fac. Emergency Coordinator' and 'Emergency Contact'.

task_completion.description: Export the updated Tier II dataset as XML to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A CAMEO export dialog, success message, or a File Explorer window showing 'contacts_updated.xml' successfully saved in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CAMEO'.

integrity.description: The agent used the CAMEO Data Manager graphical interface to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the CAMEO Data Manager application windows, menus, and forms rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually edit the XML files using a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: No screenshots showing Notepad, VSCode, or other text editors being used to manually type XML tags for the contacts.

integrity.description: The exported file was generated by CAMEO Data Manager.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent using CAMEO's built-in export functionality (e.g., File > Export > Tier II) rather than just copying and renaming the original file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Task involves importing 'C:\workspace\data\central_vt_facilities.xml' into CAMEO Data Manager. Facility 1: Montpelier Industrial Supply. Contact 1: Robert Flanagan, Title: Emergency Response Coordinator, Phone: 802-555-0219, Type: Fac. Emergency Coordinator. Facility 2: Richmond Processing Plant. Contact 2: Maria Santos, Title: Plant Safety Officer, Phone: 802-555-0347, Types: Fac. Emergency Coordinator AND Emergency Contact. Export file must be saved to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CAMEO\contacts_updated.xml'.
